conflict: The scar revelation cracked something open; Hermione has returned to proximity. The deep archive opens further and the collaborative work is the best version of what they are together
consequence: Draco stops resisting what he feels. The house is at its most seductive. The intellectual and emotional connection are no longer separable
must_land_beats: Her return to proximity after Ch11-12's withdrawal — not full trust, but present
Deeper archive: texts on original magical infrastructure construction, decodable only by combining his family knowledge with her theory
The Manor at its most seductive — warm, golden, stable, generous — creating conditions where togetherness feels natural
Draco watches her work and stops pretending he is not watching
